## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Strapi and GrowthX teams to discuss content strategy, performance, and ongoing projects.](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content pipeline is healthy, with focus on comparison pages and top-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1414.0)
  - [LLM visibility for Strapi is positive, outperforming competitors in tracked prompts](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [AI-related content opportunities identified as a priority for Q4, aligning with Strapi's recent product launches](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Some engineering-dependent workflows (e.g., social, content gap analysis) are delayed due to prioritization](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

## Topics

### Partnership Renewal Discussion

  - [Victor and Mara to have a separate meeting on Friday to discuss next year's partnership](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Mara to share outline of discussion points in text format beforehand](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=133.0)
  - [Focus on aligning priorities and understanding engineering dependencies](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=89.0)

### Content Production Update

  - [8 articles delivered last week, 7 scheduled for this week](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [SendGrid integration page to be published this week](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=243.0)
  - [Integration page meta information update workflow is progressing well](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=276.0)

### Workflow Status

  - [Medium workflow is completed and ready for use](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=319.0)
  - [CMS staging workflow has some formatting issues but is largely automated](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=297.0)
  - [Social workflow and content gap analysis tools integration delayed due to engineering priorities](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=345.0)

### Comparison Pages Progress

  - [21 out of 128 comparison pages completed](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1034.0)
  - [Focus on optimizing top 5 traffic-driving pages (e.g., Strapi vs WordPress)](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Team to take a pragmatic approach, enhancing high-traffic pages with recent case studies and updates](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)

### Performance Report Highlights

  - [Content performance close to previous highs](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Non-branded impressions increased](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [Most content pillars in top 10 positions](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1213.0)
  - [Conversion events generally rose, with slight declines in pricing link clicks and contact sales](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1252.0)

### LLM Visibility

  - [Strapi maintains a competitive edge in LLM visibility across tracked prompts](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1290.0)
  - [Plan to address prompts where Strapi isn't showing up by mapping to existing content and refreshing](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1325.0)

### AI Content Strategy

  - [Q4 theme focuses on AI, aligning with Strapi's recent product launches (Strapi AI, content agents)](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Opportunity identified for content around AI SDKs, plumbing for AI applications, and CMS relevance](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1541.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Mara to schedule Friday meeting with Victor for partnership renewal discussion](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Vivek to update project timelines in the tracking document](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=516.0)
  - [Team to clarify and resolve issues with comparison page updates in Strapi backend](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=965.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on optimizing top 5 traffic-driving comparison pages](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Vivek to include LLM traffic charts in future weekly reports](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1370.0)
  - [GrowthX to research and propose AI-related content topics](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Strapi team to provide input on AI trends and opportunities for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/D4u7QZ9tDB3pMZmyKyUMU917ae8rNQMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
